name: vllm-reasoning-parsers
description: vLLM reasoning-parser operator + developer reference. `--reasoning-parser` CLI wiring, `ReasoningParser` contract (non-streaming `extract_reasoning` + per-delta `extract_reasoning_streaming`), `is_reasoning_end` xgrammar gating, `--structured-outputs-config.enable_in_reasoning` bypass, 22 built-in parsers with per-model quirks, 15 production pitfalls, authoring custom parsers via `@ReasoningParserManager.register_module` or plugin.
